args.query: SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.OwnerId, o.ContractID__c, c.CompanySignedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#',''))=TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= DATE '2022-11-25' LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.OwnerId, o.ContractID__c, c.CompanySignedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#',''))=TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= DATE '2022-11-25' LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.OwnerId, o.ContractID__c, c.CompanySignedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#',''))=TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2022-06-25' AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) <= DATE '2022-11-25' LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, OwnerId, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, OwnerId, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" LIMIT 5;

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#',''))=TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')) WHERE CAST(o.EffectiveDate AS DATE) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND CAST(o.EffectiveDate AS DATE) <= DATE('2022-11-25') GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#',''))=TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')) WHERE CAST(o.EffectiveDate AS DATE) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND CAST(o.EffectiveDate AS DATE) <= DATE('2022-11-25') GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC LIMIT 1;
